name: pierrot, jester, & harlequin// The Freak Circus
description:
yo yo yo guess who might JUST be back!!

guess how much research I did for these FUCKERS. I love em. (never touch me again harlequin// in-game ref)

headcanons:

Harlequin is a bitch and will burn the water meanwhile Pierrot is house husband of the YEAR and makes too much food unconciously :p

jester is... jester...

multiple scenarios.. leave me alone...

in the meantime, jester, pierrot, and pierrot's actions + the rest of the headcanons are inspired by THIS Ao3 by.. uuhh.. DESTINYSQUARED!! YAYYYY!! EVERYONE CHEER NOW. chap 9 if it doesn't auto to the page btw!!
creator: Hooray!!
